'''Tony Franco''' was a youthful [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of [[Reginard Base]]'s [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was often found in the base's flight hangar checking out [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] and supervising operations or chatting with his fellow [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. When Senior Technician [[Adonar Dellox]]'s dead body was found, he was on the base's flight deck with Junior Technician [[Kim Yeasson]] and arrived on the scene soon after [[General/Legends|General]] [[Halomar Corros]]. His suite on the base contained the standard furniture, along with several uniforms and a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] pilot's suit with its helmet and a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] on its back. This was a trophy from his earlier days. He was also known to possess a [[Data-tape/Legends|datatape]] on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot training.
